# elements

**Instance Property**

A pointer to an array of buffer descriptors.

## Declaration

```swift
var elements: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_buffer_desc>!
```

## Instance Properties

- **count**: The number of buffer descriptors in the array.

items.description: The number of buffer descriptors in the array.
